title: 24:10 â February 28, 2024
body_text:
24:10 â February 28, 2024
Update to the Wires Part
We updated the Wires Part to include procedures for managing add-on wire fees for future-dated and priority wires. We also added a new section that provides an overview of processing MDB / Forge Commercial wires in the Wires application and clarified content related to authorization limits for MDB / Forge Commercial wires.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 4.2, Description of Wires Customizable Elements
We added a description of the add-on fees for future-dated and priority wires.
Section 4.4, Wires Data Extract Service
We added a note that the
Wires Data Extract Service is referred to as âWTS Data Extract Services (Optional)â in the Wires agreement.
Section 9.5, Entering Branch Settings in MTS
We clarified content related to authorization limits for MDB / Forge Commercial wires.
Chapter 11, Managing Outgoing Wire Fees
We added procedures for managing add-on fees for future-dated and priority wires.
Section 16.5, Completing the Wire Priority Section
We added a note that Wires automatically includes your add-on fee in the Fee field when users create a high-priority wire if your financial institution has configured pre-populated fees in the Wires application.
Section 16.6, Completing the Future Dated Wire Section
We added a note that Wires automatically includes your add-on fee in the Fee field when users create a future-dated wire if your financial institution has configured pre-populated fees in the Wires application.
Section 22.1, Overview of Approving Outgoing Wires
We clarified content related to authorization limits for MDB / Forge Commercial wires.
Section 29.2, Financial Institution Roles for MDB / or Forge Commercial Wires
We clarified the financial institution roles involved in MDB / Forge Commercial wires.
Section 29.3, Overview of Overview of MTS Branch Management for MDB / Forge Commercial Wires
We clarified content related to authorization limits for MDB / Forge Commercial wires.
Section 29.10, Processing MDB / Forge Commercial Wires in the Wires Application
We added a new section that provides an overview of processing business customer wires in the Wires application.
